parameters.apprise_url_plus: sendpulse://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.user_secret }} }@${ customer_secrets.{{ params.host_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.client_id_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.client_secret_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.targets_secret }} }
parameters.description: Send notifications to your own SendPulse destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise sendpulse:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters.

client_id_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's SendPulse client id

client_secret_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's SendPulse client secret

host_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's SendPulse host

targets_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's SendPulse targets

user_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's SendPulse user
